titles.ar: بَابُ مَنْ قَالَ أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَ أَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّداً عَبْدُهُ وَ رَسُولُهُ
titles.en: Chapter 40 – The one who says, ‘I testify that there is no god except for Allahazwj, Alone, there being no associates for Himazwj, and I testify that Muhammadsaww is Hisazwj servant and Hisazwj Rasoolsaww

titles.ar: بَابُ مَنْ قَالَ أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَ أَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّداً عَبْدُهُ وَ رَسُولُهُ
titles.en: Chapter 40 – The one who says, ‘I testify that there is no god except for Allahazwj, Alone, there being no associates for Himazwj, and I testify that Muhammadsaww is Hisazwj servant and Hisazwj Rasoolsaww

segments: مَنْ قَالَ أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَ أَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّداً عَبْدُهُ وَ رَسُولُهُ كَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ أَلْفَ أَلْفِ حَسَنَةٍ .
arabic.text: مَنْ قَالَ أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَ أَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّداً عَبْدُهُ وَ رَسُولُهُ كَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ أَلْفَ أَلْفِ حَسَنَةٍ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Saeed, from Abu Ubeyda Al Haza’a,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who says, ‘I testify that there is no god except Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, Alone, there being no associates for Him<sup>azwj</sup>, and I testify that Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> is His<sup>azwj</sup> servant and His<sup>azwj</sup> Rasool<sup>saww</sup>’, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would Write for him, a thousand thousand (million) good deeds’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Saeed, from Abu Ubeyda Al Haza’a,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who says, ‘I testify that there is no god except Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, Alone, there being no associates for Him<sup>azwj</sup>, and I testify that Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> is His<sup>azwj</sup> servant and His<sup>azwj</sup> Rasool<sup>saww</sup>’, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would Write for him, a thousand thousand (million) good deeds’.

segments: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Sa’Id from abu ‘Ubaydah al-Hadhdha’ from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “Whoever says, ‘I testify that no one deserves to be worshipped except Allah alone, Who has no partner, and I testify that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger, Allah will write down for him one million good deeds.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Sa’Id from abu ‘Ubaydah al-Hadhdha’ from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “Whoever says, ‘I testify that no one deserves to be worshipped except Allah alone, Who has no partner, and I testify that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger, Allah will write down for him one million good deeds.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/204)
gradings.label: حسن على الظاهر
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/204)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ أَبِي عُبَيْدَةَ الْحَذَّاءِ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
